title: 3D Wooden Fishing Rod
description: A better version of Minecraft's fishing rod! By renaming it.
body:
A very simple resource-pack
- This pack adds a 3D Wooden Fishing Rod by renaming a fishing rod
__________________________________________________________________________
Features:
- Realistic rod casting sounds
- 3D model of fishing rod, obtain by renaming a fishing rod into "Wooden Fishing Rod" 
__________________________________________________________________________
Note#
- Require Optifine or modification "Cit Resewn" mod (Fabric)
__________________________________________________________________________

Have Fun!
